calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-10-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice of Settlement is filed. *** Court vacates the sanctions ordered on AUG-02-2016 against Kit To and Merrilee C. Hague in the amount of $400.00 each. *** The Arbitration Order to Show Cause is set to CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause to JAN-10-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Continued To Nov-01-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel and Defendant's counsel are sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to NOV-01-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Paul Yee, Esq. for Defendant; no appearance by Plaintiff. The jurisdiction of the arbitrator is extended through Aug-02-2016. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Aug-02-2016, at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
